headline: Stop the snacking, execute your deficit today
summary: You're half your required pace; today matters—lock in portion control and one cardio session.
details: Today, your only food intake comes from planned Huel meals and whole foods—zero emotional snacking, zero portion guesses. Hit 45 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill to create a tangible deficit. Today matters because you're 433 days behind; momentum rebuilds one disciplined day at a time.
